scripts.build:wasm:tract-mt: echo 'build:wasm:tract-mt is intentionally unsupported: Tract does not multi-thread a single embedding forward pass, and wasm threads on wasm32-unknown-emscripten need a nightly build-std (+atomics) toolchain — heavy plumbing for no expected speedup. Use build:wasm:candle-mt instead (its gemm kernels parallelize). See docs/build-variants.md.' && exit 1
